business.headline: Rs 10,000 in PPF or SIP? Which builds more wealth in 10 yearsA simple annual investment of Rs 10,000 may not sound like much, but over time it can grow into a meaningful sum. The real question is where to invest it, i.e., the predictable returns of PPF or the market-linked potential of a SIP. So which one comes out ahead after ten years? Let's have a look!

No LPG or LNG shortage, India expands talks with global energy suppliersIndia currently imports about 195 million metric standard cubic metres per day (MMSCMD) of natural gas. Out of this, around 60 MMSCMD comes from Qatar. However, authorities said India is already exploring alternative markets to reduce dependence on any single supplier.

Sensex surges 900 points, Nifty tops 24,750; Reliance jumps 3%The Sensex ended the session 900 points higher, while the Nifty closed above 24,750, as investors stepped in to buy beaten-down stocks following the recent market correction.

Will Iran tensions shake Dubai's booming real estate market?Rising tensions involving Iran and parts of the Gulf are now testing that perception, with reports of attacks reaching areas of the UAE and raising questions about whether the region's instability could shake one of the world's hottest property markets.

Why do only 20% of women reach senior roles in the same company vs 49% men?Many organisations hire women in good numbers, yet far fewer make it to leadership positions within the same company. The gap raises an important question: what happens along the way that slows down women's career progression?

Adani Total Gas hikes industrial gas prices amid Middle East tensionsThe supply challenges come after attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes by Tehran, which have disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The narrow waterway between Iran and Oman is one of the world's most important energy routes.

Still think rural women aren't financially savvy? See how they manage moneyThe common belief is that rural women are not financially aware. Yet daily life in many households tells a different story. Women are budgeting carefully, building small savings and guiding family spending. Could rural women actually be the silent managers of household finances?

Tax deadlines coming up? Know the last dates for revised returns and advance taxTax deadlines tend to creep up quietly, and many taxpayers realise the dates only when time is running out. If you still need to correct your income tax return or plan to pay advance tax, it helps to know the key deadlines and what options are available.

India back on Russia's oil map as Iran war tightens supplyTwo oil tankers that were earlier expected to head towards East Asia have now switched their destination to India. Data from Kpler and Vortexa show the ships are carrying a combined 1.4 million barrels of Urals crude, a Russian oil grade.

Reliance shares gain 3%: Why is RIL rising today amid Iran warBrokerages said disruptions in the Middle East could tighten the supply of refined oil products globally. This could push refining margins higher, which directly benefits companies like Reliance that process crude oil into fuels such as diesel and petrol.

Rupee stabilises after record low, but oil price swings threaten outlookFor currency markets, the rupee's brief recovery may only be an interlude, as traders brace for more turbulence driven by oil prices and the shifting geopolitics of West Asia.

Sensex, Nifty up: Why is stock market rising today despite crude oil concerns?At 9:30 am, the S&P BSE Sensex was trading higher by 245.39 points at 79,361.58. The NSE Nifty50 was also up 85.50 points at 24,566.00.
Sensex, Nifty open in green as markets snap 3-day losing streak; RIL up 2%The S&P BSE Sensex was up 245.39 points to 79,361.58, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 85.50 points to 24,566.00 as of 9:30 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market open higher today?At 8:30 am, Gift Nifty futures were trading at 24,677.00. This indicates that the benchmark Nifty 50 may open above Wednesday's closing level of 24,480.5.

How companies can embrace AI without losing controlAlmost every major organisation now uses AI in customer-facing products. But this rapid adoption has exposed an uncomfortable truth. Governance frameworks have not kept pace with the speed of innovation.

Sensex falls 1,110 points, Nifty below 24,500; Tata Steel tumbles 7%The BSE Sensex fell 1,122.66 points, or 1.40%, to close at 79,116.19, while the Nifty 50 declined 385.20 points to settle at 24,480.50.

Tata Steel, L&T, JSW Steel: Why these stocks fell up to 8% todayShares of Tata Steel, Larsen & Toubro and JSW Steel plunged sharply as global tensions and rising crude oil prices rattled markets. Read on to understand what triggered the sell-off today.

Strait of Hormuz shutdown: Is India staring at an energy crisis?Iran has announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Read on to understand what it could mean for India's energy supplies and economy.

Rupee slumps to all-time low against US dollar: Why is it falling?The rupee came under pressure as escalating tensions between the US, Israel and Iran triggered global risk aversion, while rising crude oil prices and a stronger dollar weighed on emerging market currencies.

L&T shares tumble over 7%: Why is the stock down today?L&T shares dropped nearly 7% during the session as investors turned cautious amid escalating tensions involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

entertainment.headline: Family drama stories will never go out of fashion in India: Rana Daggubati Actor-producer Rana Daggubati speaks about backing unconventional cinema, reflecting on the reception to Kaanta, and his global tequila venture Loca Loka.

Yami Gautam clarifies accidental like on reel mocking Kriti Sanon's award win Actor Yami Gautam has clarified her involvement after social media users noticed her 'liking' an Instagram reel seemingly critical of Kriti Sanon's Best Actress win at an award show. She claimed that her action was unintentional.

Oscars 2026: Priyanka Chopra joins Robert Downey Jr, Chris Evans as presenter Priyanka Chopra has joined the star-studded lineup of presenters for the 98th annual Academy Awards, to be held on March 15. Conan O'Brien will be the host of the prestigious ceremony.

Britney Spears' rep speaks after singer's DUI arrest: Needs to change her lifestyle Britney Spears' recent DUI (driving under the influence of alcohol and drugs) arrest in Ventura County, California, has prompted strong statements from her representative, who has expressed concern and called her actions 'completely inexcusable.'

Hrithik Roshan on fatherhood: No achievement competes with my love for my sons Hrithik Roshan shared an emotional post on fatherhood and the relevance of success and failure. He highlighted the importance of life over just winning.

Britney Spears released after overnight arrest; court hearing set for May 4 Britney Spears was arrested on suspicion of DUI (driving under the influence) in Ventura County on Wednesday night and released Thursday morning, with official records confirming an initial court hearing for May 4.

Actor Shiva Rajkumar backs Kantara's Sapthami Gowda, slams inappropriate filming Kicker: After Sapthami Gowda flagged inappropriate filming angles by a few paps at events, veteran Kannada actor Shiva Rajkumar voiced support and urged photographers and media to respect women's dignity.

Actor and TVK chief Vijay attends wedding reception with Trisha. Watch Vijay and Trisha Krishnan attended the wedding reception of Kalpathi Suresh and Meenakshi Suresh's son. This is their first appearance amid the Jana Nayagan actor's divorce case.

Dhurandhar hits 22 million Netflix views; ranks number 1, ahead of sequel's release Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar recorded 22 million views on OTT, becoming the most watched Indian film on the platform. It also set a new benchmark as it became the ninth most watched non-English film worldwide.

Kichcha Sudeep attends cricketer Vyshak Vijaykumar's Bengaluru wedding. See pics Actor Kichcha Sudeep was present at the wedding of former RCB cricketer Vaishak Vijay Kumar in Bengaluru. As he offered congratulations to the couple, the actor attracted attention with his attire.

Thaman joins Pawan Kalyan's Ustaad Bhagat Singh for background score Thaman will provide the background score for the upcoming film Ustaad Bhagat Singh, following scheduling conflicts with original composer Devi Sri Prasad. This was confirmed by the film's production house.

Anil Kapoor's Subedaar was initially conceived as a theatrical release Anil Kapoor's Subedaar was initially conceived as a theatrical release, but after creative tweaks and structural changes during production, the film had a direct-to-digital premiere.

Hina Khan shares glimpse of her sweet world with Rocky Jaiswal in new post Television personality Hina Khan recently shared a glimpse of her life with husband Rocky Jaiswal on social media. The candid moment has drawn fans into the couple's everyday world.

Young Sherlock review: An interesting detour into the making of detective we knowRelease Date:Thu Mar 05, 2026 What was Sherlock Holmes like before he became the legendary detective the world knows? Young Sherlock imagines the restless, impulsive mind behind the myth, but stretches its mystery longer than it should.

Shah Rukh Khan's King has every name that is big enough, says Saurabh Shukla Saurabh Shukla said that Shah Rukh Khan's King has 70 per cent of Bollywood in its cast. The film, directed by Siddharth Anand, has Suhana Khan, Deepika Padukone, Anil Kapoor, Rani Mukerji, Abhishek Bachchan and Saurabh Shukla in key roles.

Man posing as film producer dupes actor Varsha Usgaonkar, others of Rs 47 lakh Actor Varsha Usgaonkar is among people who have reportedly been duped in a Rs 47 lakh fraud involving a man posing as a film producer. Police have launched an investigation into the case.

Mrithyunjay kept me hooked till the end: Nani's high praise for Sree Vishnu film Actor Nani gave a shout-out to the new thriller, Mrithyunjay, a day ahead of the film's release. The film, starring Sree Vishnu, is slated to arrive on March 6.

Prime Video, ZEE5 this week: Subedaar, Gandhi Talks, Jab Khuli Kitaab and more Prime Video and ZEE5 have rolled out a fresh lineup of titles this week, including Subedaar, Gandhi Talks, Jab Khuli Kitaab and Young Sherlock.

SRK with family, Aamir Khan attend Arjun Tendulkar-Saaniya wedding Sachin Tendulkar's son, Arjun Tendulkar, recently married entrepreneur Saaniya Chandhok in Mumbai. The wedding turned into a star-studded affair, with Bollywood icons like Shah Rukh Khan and Aamir Khan in attendance. Photos and videos from the grand celebration have since surfaced online.

general news.headline: India gets 30-day US waiver to buy Russian oil shipments stranded at seaThe United States has granted a temporary 30-day waiver allowing Russian oil cargoes stranded at sea to be sold to India, two senior U.S. officials told Reuters, aiming to ease pressure on global oil markets.

Sukhoi fighter jet that lost radar contact after take off in Assam, crashesThe Sukhoi Su-30MKI fighter jet went missing on Thursday evening shortly after it took off from Jorhat and lost radar contact on Thursday evening.

Sublime Sanju Samson, 253 just enough as India pip England to reach World Cup finalT20 World Cup semifinal: Sanju Samson's dazzling 89 powered India to 253, which proved just enough against England in a battle of batting powerhouses in Mumbai on Thursday. Jacob Bethell's stunning hundred kept England alive until the final over. India will now travel to Ahmedabad to take on New Zealand in the final on Sunday.

We want to finish Iran first: Trump says Cuba next 'just a question of time'Donald Trump says the US will focus on defeating Iran first but hinted Washington could soon shift its attention to Cuba, telling supporters it is "just a question of time."

Jasprit Bumrah wasn't travelling to Ahmedabad alone. He took Team India with himT20 World Cup semifinal: India's 253 seemed safe. Yet Jacob Bethell's stunning counterattack revived England's hopes before Jasprit Bumrah's control at the death secured a narrow win and India's passage to the T20 World Cup final.

Live: Blasts near Abu Dhabi airport, Saudi intercepts new drone as war enters day 7US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: On Day 7, the war in the Middle East intensified as Iran launched fresh missile attacks on Israel and US bases, with Israel intercepting incoming strikes. Israeli forces also hit Hezbollah positions in Lebanon, where at least eight people were killed. The conflict has killed more than 1,230 people in Iran, over 70 in Lebanon and about a dozen in Israel, while six U.S. troops have died. The U.S. Embassy in Kuwait shut down after Iranian retaliatory strikes. The fighting has rattled global markets, pushed oil prices higher and slowed shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, while U.S. President Donald Trump signalled interest in influencing Iran's next leadership. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for live updates on the ongoing Middle East conflict.

Jasprit Bumrah deserved the Player of the Match award vs England: Sanju SamsonT20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Sanju Samson said that Jasprit Bumrah deserved the Player of the Match award after India beat England by seven runs on Thursday and booked their berth in the final against New Zealand.

Nepal's rapper-mayor Balen Shah surges ahead in polls with Gen Z backingBalen Shah is locked in a contest with KP Oli in Jhapa, a race that has drawn national attention as a symbol of the battle between Nepal's political old guard and a new generation of leaders.

How Rashmika-Vijay broke the Bollywood wedding formulaThe last celebrity wedding that genuinely shifted the visual conversation was when Virat Kohli married Anushka Sharma in Tuscany in 2017. In 2026, Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda have had a similar impact.

Actor and TVK chief Vijay attends wedding reception with Trisha. WatchVijay and Trisha Krishnan attended the wedding reception of Kalpathi Suresh and Meenakshi Suresh's son. This is their first appearance amid the Jana Nayagan actor's divorce case.

The real question is where to invest it, i.e., the predictable returns of PPF or the market-linked potential of a SIP. So which one comes out ahead after ten years? Let's have a look!

'Bapu' Axar and Bumrah: Two Gujaratis rewrite history at WankhedeT20 World Cup: India's 253 lit up the T20 World Cup semi-final. Axar Patel's gravity-defying catches and Jasprit Bumrah's death-over mastery crushed England's chase. It was yesterday once more.

Watch: Nasa captures timelapse of the Blood Moon gracing the skyThe video showcases the Moon's eerie glow against the backdrop of Nasa's key manufacturing site for the Space Launch System (SLS) rocket, highlighting the agency's deep ties to lunar exploration.

How Robotic Knee Replacement is Redefining the Journey Back to MobilityEarly consultation with an orthopaedic specialist is essential. Delaying surgery in severe cases can lead to worsening deformity and reduced functional outcomes.

Britney Spears' rep speaks after singer's DUI arrest: Needs to change her lifestyleBritney Spears' recent DUI (driving under the influence of alcohol and drugs) arrest in Ventura County, California, has prompted strong statements from her representative, who has expressed concern and called her actions 'completely inexcusable.'

Family drama stories will never go out of fashion in India: Rana DaggubatiActor-producer Rana Daggubati speaks about backing unconventional cinema, reflecting on the reception to Kaanta, and his global tequila venture Loca Loka.

We are waiting for them: Iran warns US ground invasion would be a big disasterAbbas Araghchi says Tehran is ready for a US ground invasion, rejects ceasefire talks, and warns American troops would face a "big disaster" as the war widens across the region.

At the top together: Samson backs Abhishek Sharma to fire in T20 World Cup finalT20 World Cup: India wicketkeeper Sanju Samson has thrown his support behind out-of-form opener Abhishek Sharma, saying the youngster could still make an impact in the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand.

Anthropic CEO vows court fight after Pentagon labels AI firm 'supply chain risk'Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei says the company will challenge the Pentagon's decision labeling the AI firm a supply chain risk to national security after the Defense Department formally notified the company.

Arjun Tendulkar marries Saaniya Chandhok in star-studded Mumbai weddingArjun Tendulkar married Saaniya Chandhok in a star-studded ceremony in South Mumbai on March 5. Several prominent personalities from cricket, Bollywood and business attended the celebrations alongside the Tendulkar family.

Trump wants say in who will lead Iran, calls Khamenei's son a lightweightThe US President also said that Washington does not want a leader who would continue with Ali Khamenei's policies, as it would drag the country into another war in the next five years.

How many do we score? Suryakumar jokes after England nearly chase 254 in MumbaiIndia captain Suryakumar Yadav admits being very nervous during their narrow seven-run win against England in the T20 World Cup semi-final. England almost chased down 254 as they finished their innings on 246/7 in their 20 overs.

What is a torpedo? Does India have these killer weapons?The sinking of the IRIS Dena by an American submarine in the Indian Ocean and off the coast of Sri Lanka marks the first time the US sunk a ship with a torpedo after World War Two. What are torpedoes, and why are these centuries-old weapons still relevant in an age dominated by long-range missiles?

sports.headline: At the top together: Samson backs Abhishek Sharma to fire in T20 World Cup final T20 World Cup: India wicketkeeper Sanju Samson has thrown his support behind out-of-form opener Abhishek Sharma, saying the youngster could still make an impact in the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand.

'5 sixes to nahi khaunga': Axar Patel was ready to bowl the final over vs England India vice-captain Axar Patel revealed he was ready to bowl the final over against England in the T20 World Cup semi-final. Shivam Dube ultimately bowled the last over to secure a thrilling seven-run victory for India, setting up a final clash with New Zealand.

Thala for a reason? Fans hail MS Dhoni's presence as India beat England by 7 runs MS Dhoni's fans started the 'Thala for a reason' trend on social media after India defeated England by seven runs to secure a place in the T20 World Cup final in the presence of the former India captain.

Jasprit Bumrah deserved the Player of the Match award vs England: Sanju Samson T20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Sanju Samson said that Jasprit Bumrah deserved the Player of the Match award after India beat England by seven runs on Thursday and booked their berth in the final against New Zealand.

Axar's safe hands helped Wankhede breathe, tilted semifinal in India's favour Axar Patel's acrobatic fielding helped India regain control in the T20 World Cup semi-final against England. He took the most important catch of the match to dismiss Will Jacks in the 14th over.

Sublime Sanju Samson, 253 just enough as India pip England to reach World Cup final T20 World Cup semifinal: Sanju Samson's dazzling 89 powered India to 253, which proved just enough against England in a battle of batting powerhouses in Mumbai on Thursday. Jacob Bethell's stunning hundred kept England alive until the final over. India will now travel to Ahmedabad to take on New Zealand in the final on Sunday.

Jacob Bethell lights up Wankhede with 45-ball century in semifinal against India T20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Jacob Bethell scored a 45-ball century in the semifinal of the tournament against India on Thursday, March 5 at the iconic Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai. But his knock went in vain as England lost by seven runs to crash out of the tournament.

MS Dhoni, Rohit Sharma cheer India from stands in semi-final against England T20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Former captains MS Dhoni and Rohit Sharma cheered for the Men in Blue in the semifinal against Harry Brook's England on Thursday, March 5 at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai

Rejuvenated Sanju Samson misses 100, but makes Harry Brook pay for his mistake Sanju Samson continued his brilliant form with an 89-run knock in the T20 World Cup semi-final against England. His powerful innings helped India set a strong foundation after Abhishek Sharma against departed cheaply.

Melbourne mayhem awaits: What to expect from F1's 2026 season openerFormula 1's 2026 season begins amid controversy over new hybrid regulations and geopolitical tensions. Despite criticism from top drivers and war concerns, the Australian GP promises thrilling unpredictability.

Smriti Mandhana joins Team Barbie with special doll before International Women's DaySmriti Mandhana has been honoured by Barbie ahead of International Women's Day, becoming the first cricketer to have a Barbie doll. She joins a global list of trailblazing women, including tennis legend Serena Williams, recognising her exceptional contributions to Indian cricket.

Abhishek Sharma flops in semifinal as poor run of T20 World Cup form continuesT20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Abhishek Sharma scored nine runs off seven balls in the semifinal against Harry Brook's England at the Wankhede Stadium before Will Jacks accounted for his wicket.

IND vs ENG: Suryakumar Yadav unfazed by dew factor at Wankhede as England bowl firstIND vs ENG, T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal: India captain Suryakumar Yadav remains confident despite losing the toss as England opt to bowl first in the T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal at Mumbai's Wankhede Stadium on Thursday.

ICC responds to Sammy's plea, sends private charter for West Indies to return homeT20 World Cup 2026: A charter flight has been arranged for the West Indies cricket team after they were stranded in Kolkata for five days due to airspace restrictions following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

Lakshya Sen enters quarterfinals of All England ChampionshipsIndia's Lakshya Sen overcame the disappointment of squandering four match points in the second game to dominate the decider against Hong Kong's Ng Ka Long Angus and reach the quarterfinals of the All England Open 2026 on Thursday.

Ellyse Perry to return in pink-ball Test against India? Alyssa Healy revealsAUSW vs INDW: Alyssa Healy provided an update on Ellyse Perry's participation in Australia's pink-ball Test against India, which begins on March 6 at the WACA in Perth. Perry missed the ODIs due to a quad injury.

Afghanistan sack Rashid Khan as T20I captain, announce squads for Sri Lanka seriesAFG vs SL: Afghanistan have removed Rashid Khan as their T20I captain while announcing the squads for their upcoming multi-format series against Sri Lanka. Rashid was dropped following Afghanistan's failure to qualify for the Super 8 stage of the T20 World Cup.

IND vs ENG Highlight: India avoid Bethell scare to reach finalIndia (IND) vs England (ENG) Highlights, T20 World Cup semi-final: Defending champions India booked their place in the T20 World Cup final with a nervy seven-run win over England in a high-scoring semi-final at Mumbai's Wankhede Stadium.

India Women eye redemption in pink-ball Test in Alyssa Healy's Australia farewellAUSW vs INDW: Harmanpreet Kaur's India and Alyssa Healy's Australia will lock horns in the pink-ball Women's Test, starting March 6 at the WACA in Perth. The focus will be on Alyssa Healy, who'll play in her last international match for the Aussies.

Sanju Samson's redemption will ease pressure on Abhishek Sharma: Dinesh KarthikT20 World Cup: Dinesh Karthik believes Sanju Samson's form can ease pressure on Abhishek Sharma in the T20 World Cup. The former India wicketkeeper feels Samson's presence at the top could help Abhishek rediscover his rhythm.

Cricket royalty turns up at Arjun Tendulkar-Saaniya Chandhok wedding in MumbaiCricket legends and prominent personalities attended Arjun Tendulkar and Saaniya Chandhok's star-studded wedding ceremony in Mumbai. Guests included Sunil Gavaskar, Rahul Dravid, Anil Kumble, Ravi Shastri, Yuvraj Singh, Virender Sehwag, Zaheer Khan, Harbhajan Singh and Irfan Pathan. Prithvi Shaw and Parthiv Patel were also present, while ICC chairman Jay Shah and chief selector Ajit Agarkar attended with their spouses, making the celebration a gathering of several stalwarts of Indian cricket.

Arjun Tendulkar marries Saaniya Chandhok in star-studded Mumbai weddingArjun Tendulkar married Saaniya Chandhok in a star-studded ceremony in South Mumbai on March 5. Several prominent personalities from cricket, Bollywood and business attended the celebrations alongside the Tendulkar family.

I just want to go home: West Indies coach's plea as team remains stranded in IndiaWest Indies coach Darren Sammy expressed frustration on social media after his team was stranded in India following flight cancellations due to the ongoing West Asia conflict.

MS Dhoni arrives with wife Sakshi at Arjun Tendulkar-Saaniya Chandhok weddingMS Dhoni attended Arjun Tendulkar and Saaniya Chandhok's wedding in Mumbai along with wife Sakshi. Several former cricketers and prominent personalities from cricket, politics and films were also present at the ceremony.

Harry Brook's Fab 4 audition: Why the England captain must deliver at WankhedeIND vs ENG, T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal: Harry Brook's journey to the Wankhede semifinal represents his biggest audition yet. Like Kohli, Smith and Williamson before him, he needs that one defining innings to cement his place among cricket's elite.

Pakistan player fined after alleged misconduct with female hotel staff in Sri LankaT20 World Cup: Pakistan cricket has landed in fresh controversy after a T20 World Cup squad player was reportedly fined for alleged misconduct with a female hotel staff member in Sri Lanka. The player's identity has not been disclosed.

The night India's World Cup dream died at Wankhede and hubris fell silentIn 1987, defending champions India stood on the brink of history, banners aloft and belief unshaken. But as England played spoiler at Wankhede, confidence turned into heartbreak and stunned silence.

Win the toss, win the match? How dew will impact T20 World Cup semifinal in MumbaiAs India face England in the T20 World Cup semi-final at Mumbai's Wankhede Stadium, the toss and the evening dew could prove decisive. Should the team winning the toss opt to chase or focus on putting runs on the board in the big semifinal?

Jos Buttler out of form: But should India be wary of England's sleeping giant?T20 World Cup, IND vs ENG: Jos Buttler has endured a disastrous run of form in the tournament but will have an opportunity to make amends when England take on India in the high-stakes semi-final on Thursday at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
